Document: # Crew or Not Crew! Crew is defined simply as someone who is wearing a crewmember ID card. The silicon's hud helpfully indicates this by surrounding the job icon in green if they are on the default lawset and the person is crew, yellow if there has been a law change (and thus 'crew' may be redefined or no longer relevant) and the person is crew, and no outline for someone who is crew. This does mean that the captain taking off their ID is no longer crew, and can be treated as such. (This is not an excuse to murder the captain the moment they take off their ID, your interactions with non-crew are still governed by the server rules. However, the Captain's orders can be ignored)
